summary: Iteration 25 testing completed: All 12 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: Ticket routing and escalation system - training_application/bursary_application auto-assigns to subgroup head, hr_query/technical_support routes to admins, escalation (category change) re-routes ticket and creates system comment, notifications created for assigned head or admins.

issues: Missing `aria-describedby` warning in console for DialogContent - minor accessibility improvement (same as iteration 24)

training_application.test: POST /api/tickets with category='training_application' by MIB employee (mokoenam@sentech.co.za)
training_application.result: PASS - Auto-assigned to subgroup head (Kgomotso Tsholofetso Mothibi, mothibik@sentech.co.za)

bursary_application.test: POST /api/tickets with category='bursary_application' by MIB employee

subgroup_head_visibility.result: PASS - Subgroup head sees tickets assigned to them

escalation_to_hr_query.result: PASS - Ticket re-routed to admins, assigned_to cleared, escalated_from set

escalation_to_technical_support.result: PASS - Ticket re-routed to admins, escalated_from set

escalation_system_comment.result: PASS - System comment created: 'Escalated ticket from "Training Application" to "HR Query"'

notification_for_assigned_head.test: Check notifications for subgroup head after training/bursary ticket creation
notification_for_assigned_head.result: PASS - Notification created with type='ticket_assigned', title='New Training Application Ticket'

notification_for_admins_hr_query.test: Check notifications for admins after hr_query ticket creation
notification_for_admins_hr_query.result: PASS - Notification created for admins with title='New HR Query Ticket'

notification_for_admins_technical_suppor.test: Check notifications for admins after technical_support ticket creation
notification_for_admins_technical_suppor.result: PASS - Notification created for admins with title='New Technical Support Ticket'

admin_ticket_visibility.result: PASS - Admin sees all tickets including escalated ones with proper routing info

category_order.test: Check category dropdown order in New Ticket dialog
category_order.result: PASS - Training Application is first/default category

ticket_card_routing_display.test: Check ticket card shows routing info
ticket_card_routing_display.result: PASS - Shows 'Assigned to: [name]', 'Routed to Admins', 'Escalated' badge

escalation_dropdown_for_head.test: Check escalation dropdown visible for assigned head on training/bursary tickets
escalation_dropdown_for_head.result: PASS - 'Escalate...' dropdown visible on ticket card

escalation_controls_in_dialog.test: Check escalation buttons in ticket detail dialog for assigned head
escalation_controls_in_dialog.result: PASS - 'Escalate this ticket' section with 'HR Query' and 'Technical Support' buttons visible

admin_status_dropdown.test: Check admin can change ticket status
admin_status_dropdown.result: PASS - Status dropdown visible for admin on all tickets

mocked_apis.SMTP_email_notifications: MOCKED - Logs to console instead of sending real emails

seed_data_creation: Test tickets created and deleted during tests (TEST_ prefixed). Existing escalated ticket (deabe51d) was already in system from manual testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 25 ticket routing/escalation features verified working: 1) Training/Bursary Application tickets auto-assign to subgroup head based on creator's division/department - uses subgroups collection to find leader_id, 2) HR Query/Technical Support tickets route to admins pool (no specific assignee), 3) Escalation (category change from training/bursary to hr_query/technical_support) re-routes ticket to admins, clears assigned_to, sets escalated_from field, and creates system comment, 4) Notifications created for assigned head (training/bursary) or all admins (hr_query/technical_support), 5) Frontend shows proper routing info: 'Assigned to: [name]', 'Routed to Admins', 'Escalated' badge, 6) Escalation controls only visible for non-admin users who are assigned to training/bursary tickets, 7) Categories ordered: Training Application (first/default), Bursary Application, HR Query, Technical Support.
